'''Moza''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] and the primary representative of [[Chodo Habat]] on [[Citadel Station]]. Moza approached [[Meetra Surik]] about assisting with the [[Telosian Restoration Project|restoration]] of [[Telos IV]] by thwarting [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]] and the [[Exchange]] who sought to undermine the work of the Ithorians.

==Behind the scenes==
While Moza attempts to contact the Exile first, the player has a few chances to either reject contact or to reject Moza's plea for assistance. If the player does so, [[Jana Lorso]], of [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]] contacts the Exile. If the player agrees to aid Lorso, then Chodo and Moza will refuse to speak with them.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
